old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-ko1n","title":"EDHOC: Plaintext buffer in responder_process_msg3 exactly at size limit","description":"CORRECTNESS: plaintext_3 buffer size exactly matches maximum, no margin for error.

Location: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:1066

uint8_t plaintext_3[128];  // EDHOC_MAX_PLAINTEXT_LEN

Check at line 1038: if (msg3_len > EDHOC_MAX_MSG3_LEN) // 136 = 128 + 8

Decryption at line 1067: aead_decrypt(..., msg3, msg3_len, plaintext_3)
Output size: msg3_len - 8 = up to 128 bytes

This is correct but tight:
- If EDHOC_MAX_PLAINTEXT_LEN or EDHOC_MAX_MSG3_LEN are ever changed independently
- Or if the tag size (8) changes
- The buffer would overflow

Fix: Define plaintext_3 size in terms of EDHOC_MAX_MSG3_LEN - EDHOC_TAG_LEN for clarity and safety:
uint8_t plaintext_3[EDHOC_MAX_MSG3_LEN - EDHOC_TAG_LEN];

File: lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:1066","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:44.496206Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:44.496236Z"}
